demographics.occupation: office-based professional (facing a formal workplace performance review)
demographics.living_situation: lives independently at a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is racing so fast it hurts, I'm sweating through my clothes, and my brain has completely blanked—I can't remember anything for my review tomorrow.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight, a few hours before a huge work performance review tomorrow, and I'm scared something is wrong with my heart.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly this evening, a few hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours and still going
symptom_narrative.character: my heart is pounding and racing, my chest feels tight and it actually hurts, I'm drenched in sweat and my mind has gone blank
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it's really severe, the worst I've felt physically, like something terrible is about to happen
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mostly my chest, and my whole body is sweating and trembling
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started tonight, and it gets worse whenever I look at my notes
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped, sitting down hasn't settled it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about the review and looking at all my preparation notes
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: heavy sweating, trembling hands, breathing fast, and I keep drawing a complete blank—I couldn't even recall my own phone number
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get really wound up and anxious before big evaluations at work, but it's never hit me this hard physically before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sleep, can't prepare, and I can't think straight at all

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I don't drink much caffeine and I'm not on any stimulants
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I have a very high-stakes work performance review tomorrow that I've been preparing for intensely for the last couple of days. I feel enormous pressure being judged by senior people, and past evaluations have left me anxious and full of self-doubt. I'm exhausted from constantly feeling I have to prove myself at work.

objective_data_offered.value: it feels like it's racing over 120, pounding really hard
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-perceived rate only, no device used

objective_data_offered.value: visibly sweating heavily with trembling hands and fast breathing
sweating through my clothes and shaking
